languages.text: Подъемник не работает. Чтобы найти и оживить питающий его генератор, нужно расчистить вход в исследовательский лагерь мельта-зарядом.
To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.
languages.original_text: Подъемник не работает. Чтобы найти и оживить питающий его генератор, нужно расчистить вход в исследовательский лагерь мельта-зарядом.

traits.locale_text: To restore power, clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.
To restore power, clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.
To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

languages.text: Um die Energieversorgung wiederherzustellen, musst du den Eingang des Forschungslagers mit einer Melterladung sprengen und den Generator neu starten.
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

traits.locale_text: Um die Energieversorgung wiederherzustellen, musst du den Eingang des Forschungslagers mit einer Melterladung sprengen und den Generator neu starten.

languages.text: Pour rétablir le courant, vous devez vous ménager un passage jusqu'au camp de recherche à l'aide d'une charge à fusion. Une fois sur place, vous pourrez redémarrer le générateur.
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

traits.locale_text: Pour rétablir le courant, vous devez vous ménager un passage jusqu'au camp de recherche à l'aide d'une charge à fusion. Une fois sur place, vous pourrez redémarrer le générateur.

languages.text: 要恢复电力，你需要用热熔炸弹炸开研究营地的入口，然后重新启动发电机。
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

traits.locale_text: 要恢复电力，你需要用热熔炸弹炸开研究营地的入口，然后重新启动发电机。

languages.text: Para restablecer la energía, debes despejar la entrada al campamento con una carga de fusión y reactivar el generador.
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

traits.locale_text: Para restablecer la energía, debes despejar la entrada al campamento con una carga de fusión y reactivar el generador.

languages.text: 電力を回復させるには、メルタ・チャージで研究キャンプの入り口をクリアし、発電機を再起動させなければならない。
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

languages.text: Gücü geri getirmek için araştırma kampının girişini bir melta bombasıyla açmalı ve jeneratörü yeniden başlatmalısın.
languages.original_text: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.

traits.locale_text: Gücü geri getirmek için araştırma kampının girişini bir melta bombasıyla açmalı ve jeneratörü yeniden başlatmalısın.
